title: erysimum exaltatum
intro: Erysimum exaltatum, also known as the Exalted Wallflower, is a flowering plant species native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The health benefits of Erysimum exaltatum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties.
